scripts.build:sidecar: TRIPLE=$(rustc --print host-tuple) && [ -n "$TRIPLE" ] && cd ../desktopd && go build -o desktopd ./cmd/desktopd && cd ../desktop-ui && mkdir -p src-tauri/binaries && cp ../desktopd/desktopd "src-tauri/binaries/desktopd-$TRIPLE" || { echo '⚠ desktopd 사이드카 빌드/복사 실패 (go/rustc 확인) — 빌드 중단'; exit 1; }
